name: Whether a person returned on the 12th or on the 13th of Dhu al-Hijjah from Mina to
introduction:
Makka during the day of tashriq (i.e. from the 10th to 13th of Dhu al-Hijjah) was immaterial.
What was of real importance was not the number of days spent at Mina but the intensity of
one's devotion to God during the period of one's stay.
